_provenance: V1.A phase-7 voice pack (V1.A_asia_hint_states.md). Source draft: narrative_revision/phase_7_drafts/V1_A_draft_pass3.md (pass 3 — pass-1 + pass-2 hostile critique + in-house arbitration; 0 critical failures; commit shape). 10 legacy lines verbatim from _legacy/dialogue_samples.txt lines 50-59; 2 new lines (halina_met, archive_research_complete) authored from pack §B.1 recommended sample shapes. V1.4 (2026-05-12): four coffee-result hint states added per minigames.txt §Chapter integration — Chapter 1 (Asia return comments). Inserted between hint_court_ready and hint_won_court so they only fire in the post-readiness, pre-court window.
_scope: asia_hint_states_ch1.json owns Asia's repeatable hint-NPC surface for chapter 1. Encodes the get_asia_hint() first-unmet-flag-wins priority logic from story.txt lines 1245-1288. 16 states in priority order (12 progression + 4 coffee-result); the engine evaluates triggers top-to-bottom and returns the first matching state's line. All states are repeatable (no on_dismiss except hint_halina_arrived_announcement). Asia is the sole speaker; there is no turn structure. Voice-reference records are in dialogue_samples_asia.jsonl (ids: asia_ch01_v1_a_p3_hint_state_<flag>_001).
_engine_flags_required: The engine calls get_asia_hint() when the player interacts with Asia's reception desk. Evaluate state triggers top-to-bottom; return the first match. All flags are in the chapter1 namespace. The default state (state 16) has no flag condition and always matches if no earlier state fires.
_address_forms: Asia does not address the player as Dr. Cula in hint-state lines. Other NPCs: Mr. Pig, Mr. Murrow, Mrs. Sikorska, Mr. Swine (formal-titled); Crab, Whimsy (bare).
_comment_coffee_window_narrowing: Per user instruction, hint_coffee_skipped is gated on chapter1.coffee_tutorial_seen == false. That bare gate would match from game start; narrowing to (court_ready && !entered_court) confines all four coffee hints to the post-readiness, pre-court window where Asia would plausibly comment on the coffee choice. Once entered_court flips, the coffee hints stop firing and hint_won_court (and below) takes over. The narrowing also keeps the coffee hints from blocking earlier progression states.

states._comment: State 1 — player has not yet seen Pig's Beat-2 panic line; point toward Mr. Pig.
lines: You should talk to Mr. Pig first. He's the loudest crisis in the room.

states._comment: State 2 — Pig crisis revealed; Murrow not yet met; point toward Mr. Murrow.
lines: Mr. Murrow will know what the case is actually about. He's somewhere between the files and disappointment.

states._comment: State 3 — Murrow met; binder not yet collected; point toward the archive and the procedural binder.
lines: You're looking for the procedural binder? I tried lifting it once and briefly saw another dimension.

states._comment: State 4 — binder collected; Crab not yet recruited; point toward Crab.
lines: If it's a service problem, Crab will have an opinion. He always has an opinion.

states._comment: State 5 — Crab recruited; Rights Memo not yet collected; point toward Whimsy at Café Paragraf. Single sanctioned em-dash.
lines: The rights memo may be near Whimsy. Try Café Paragraf — or wherever someone is talking too loudly about fairness.

states._comment: State 6 — Rights Memo collected; Whimsy not yet recruited; point toward Whimsy and the fair-hearing angle.
lines: Whimsy is useful if pointed at the right legal issue. Try asking him about fair hearing.

states._comment: Chapter 1 Phase B.3 — Beat 7 close announcement. Fires when Cula returns to the office after recruiting Whimsy. On dismiss, sets halina_arrived=true which (a) flips Halina's NPC presence_flags gate so she becomes visible in the meeting room, and (b) makes hint_halina_met (state 7) the next reachable line. Single line lifted from halina.json client_meeting_<stance> opening, repositioned as a pre-meeting cue per V1.4 pack §B.2. Priority-ordered ahead of hint_halina_met because both triggers match when recruited_whimsy=true && halina_arrived=false.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska is here. I've shown her into the meeting room.

states._comment: State 7 — Whimsy recruited; Halina has arrived for Beat 8 client meeting; point toward Mrs. Sikorska in the meeting room. Phase-8 new state.
lines: Mrs. Sikorska is in the meeting room. She brought her own folder.

states._comment: State 8 — Beat 8 client meeting concluded; Murrow in archive with binder for Beat 9 research; point toward Mr. Murrow in the archive. Phase-8 new state.
lines: Mr. Murrow is in the archive with the binder. He's been making the disappointed-page-turn sound.

states._comment: State 9 — archive research complete; Beat 10 readiness check not yet completed; point toward Mr. Murrow's check.
lines: Mr. Murrow should check the case before court. He has a special face for missing documents.

states._comment: Coffee-result V1.4 — S-grade reaction. Window: post-readiness, pre-court. Asia notices the unusually well-behaved café machine. Line drawn from minigames.txt §Character reactions §Asia Perfect, lightly adapted for the office-return setting.
lines: You made the café machine sound less haunted. That's new.

states._comment: Coffee-result V1.4 — A/B-grade reaction. Line verbatim from minigames.txt §Chapter integration — Chapter 1 §Asia return comments, 'Procedurally Alert' variant.
lines: You look prepared. Or at least caffeinated in a legally promising way.

states._comment: Coffee-result V1.4 — D/F-grade reaction. Line verbatim from minigames.txt §Chapter integration — Chapter 1 §Asia return comments, 'Over-Caffeinated' variant.
lines: You are vibrating near the case board. I'll mark that as readiness-adjacent.

states._comment: Coffee-result V1.4 — skipped reaction. Per user instruction, the load-bearing gate is chapter1.coffee_tutorial_seen == false; the additional (court_ready && !entered_court) clause scopes the line to the post-readiness, pre-court window so the hint does not fire from game start (when coffee_tutorial_seen is also false). Line verbatim from minigames.txt §Chapter integration — Chapter 1 §Asia return comments, 'Skipped' variant.
lines: No coffee? Brave. Not wise, necessarily, but brave.

states._comment: State 10 — readiness check passed; court not yet resolved; point toward the District Court walk north. NOTE: chapter1.won_court is referenced here but is NOT declared in state.gd::reset_state() — pre-existing bug, the bare-truthiness clause '!chapter1.won_court' resolves to null and the runner returns false, so this state never matches. Left untouched (not Design's scope to add flags). Surface in PROPOSAL.
lines: If Mr. Murrow says you're ready, go north to the District Court. And maybe drink water.

states._comment: State 11 — court won; Beat-14 Swine postcard not yet arrived; anticipates postcard arrival. NOTE: chapter1.won_court is referenced here but is NOT declared in state.gd — pre-existing bug, this state cannot match. See hint_won_court note.
lines: Something arrived from Mr. Swine. The stamp looks expensive and irresponsible.

states._comment: State 12 — default; all chapter-1 flags satisfied; post-postcard chapter coda. No further hint needed; line is a chapter-close register.
lines: For the first time today, nothing is actively on fire. I give it twelve minutes.
